    294.Astarion: No, no. No healing sleep for you. Wake up!note: Astarion is in front of Cazador's coffin, which is open, showing the vampire recovering insideCOM

    Flags and Tags

          287.Speaker 0: Get your hands off me, worm.note: Cazador is slumped on the ground, waking up from his rest

          Metadata

                  30.Astarion: One last thrust and I'll be free of you. I'll never have to fear you again.note: playing with the knife in his hand

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 099ffb7e-6ad3-4035-9ce3-41b5595a998aSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbac1e785ge435g432eg930cg68ceb7326711Text UUID: 8181505c-0b0c-4cd6-8c6d-f4d13ff5353eTimeline Phase Index: 195Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 099ffb7e-6ad3-4035-9ce3-41b5595a998aTimeline Phase Duration: 13.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin (896d5114-7a59-4156-82b7-8f6a8e531d70) @ 2253.95sAddressed Speaker: 0
                  • +
                    74.Astarion: But if I finish the ritual you started, I'll never have to fear anyone, ever.!LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Global
                    • LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted {71cb0aae-aea2-4304-9932-4c57bf6669a8} = False

                    Metadata

                    • +
                      49.Speaker 0: You think me a fool? That I would allow anyone to usurp me, speak the words, and ascend in my place?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 125b577c-6e5c-7cad-db41-d01fcc575973Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h428fe3dag9eaag4264gaeb2g1c579c9843f7Text UUID: 0f1fb71f-0c76-4d88-9497-83755c767e9fGroup ID: 1ce0652d-02c7-9a1a-b2f6-db6979adbb87Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 1
                      • +
                        216.Speaker 0: The runes I carved into your flesh bind you and all seven thousand souls to the ritual. Complete it and those bearing the scars will be sacrificed - you included.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 55fc4b91-b6d8-d7a5-2fbe-bf046bb2d425Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3482fc7agd78cg4000g87a5g1b3de25f629aText UUID: 18289e24-53be-43e8-bfa2-a04b6ccdc8c3Group ID: 1ce0652d-02c7-9a1a-b2f6-db6979adbb87Group Index: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                        • +
                          153.Speaker 0: You are simply a means to an end. I made you to be consumed.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a791d5e-4da5-87a8-38d2-7d8fc2fa3728Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5b720789g1f69g4090g9401g6434d71ecd48Text UUID: 397974d9-046b-4443-b35f-094275ed1be1Group ID: 1ce0652d-02c7-9a1a-b2f6-db6979adbb87Group Index: 3Addressed Speaker: 1
                          • +

                                167.Player: If I help you complete the ritual, it will kill all these people.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4320fbef-d892-6fd2-efea-24a5d6aa7922Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h7619594agdb33g43a9g8ebeg9ff5b769558eText UUID: 1605bd36-4a15-4e9c-89aa-0b2ae1b09e00Show Once: True
                                • +
                                  576.Astarion: These people died years ago, trust me on that. All that's left are feral spawn, desperate for blood.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e292db88-7ebf-86cf-eeda-8948cdcbdb41Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0790fbcdgc9efg4e3fgb720g8a677014b84eText UUID: 8305827e-eb56-4306-9cc6-adea8507df69Timeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e292db88-7ebf-86cf-eeda-8948cdcbdb41Timeline Phase Duration: 11.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                  • +
                                    456.Astarion: If we release them, how many people will they kill? Tens of thousands? Hundreds of thousands?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5192fe7-dc3e-0f06-8a73-e99f4bdc8693Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1723084dgbc30g40f9ga722gdbe38d4e757cText UUID: 4359bc0c-150d-48b3-84da-d5db4c35b3a3Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b5192fe7-dc3e-0f06-8a73-e99f4bdc8693Timeline Phase Duration: 6.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                    • +
                                      331.Astarion: But if they die and I ascend, I won't have to rely on the parasite to walk in the sun. I'll be free - truly, completely free. Isn't that what you want?ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion

                                              379.Astarion: But I'm not above enjoying this.note: Hunkers down face-to-face with Cazador

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 97bec166-d849-3d39-f612-f33150c25c4eSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h916a177egb06fg4d3egae81g771f71a00e20Text UUID: 1de08411-03bc-473e-86d9-259895b4967aTimeline Phase Index: 20Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 97bec166-d849-3d39-f612-f33150c25c4eTimeline Phase Duration: 2.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • +
                                                290.Speaker 0: No - urgh!note: Astarion, hunkered down before him, stabs Cazador in the chest. Cazador slumps to the ground, lying on his back. Astarion rams the knife into Cazador's chest over and over, letting out centuries of rage.

                                                Metadata

                                                              • +
                                                                114.Speaker 14: What does that mean for us?

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c9e02a7-21bd-11cd-fd60-04770fce9822Speaker: 14 (Speaker 14)Text Handle: hc624fa78g0b7cg42a4g9db2g6986bd897bf0Text UUID: b9e6ed96-19d0-4ab8-a908-d79a1cf44870Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2c9e02a7-21bd-11cd-fd60-04770fce9822Timeline Phase Duration: 3.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: AstarionStabsCazador_aftermath (2728b31e-9c19-48f0-9476-01d8c1b5cc0a) @ 1607.63s
                                                                • +
                                                                  639.Player: It means you're free - you can do whatever you want.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fb40ddd9-8c08-d2cd-50ac-15993acb8240Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h2cdbdcceg8394g4d39ga552g44dd085954efText UUID: a211019f-9f5c-4d98-8883-6c80c5375c41Show Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    150.Astarion: 'You can do whatever you want' sounds terrifying - and it is - but there's opportunity in it, too.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3979ca67-46ed-6f63-1229-a83b42f021a8Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hfb4de374g8c20g4135g9989g2b91cb23acd8Text UUID: 21ecf9ba-38ed-4ac1-9715-07ff16eb543eTimeline Phase Index: 247Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3979ca67-46ed-6f63-1229-a83b42f021a8Timeline Phase Duration: 14.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Location Changes: AstarionStabsCazador_aftermath_dialogue_01 (b4bf121c-e10b-486e-8221-07ff9d0608e9) @ 2808.31s
                                                                    • +
                                                                      95.Astarion: You can hide here, living in the shadows like parasites, or you can be more than what he made us to be.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 225532fd-6658-3fce-923a-e4863137dec3Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1723a589gdff2g45ecg9f1cg2bedf4019982Text UUID: b8717abf-e711-475a-9834-16a23a45dfc9Timeline Phase Index: 152Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 225532fd-6658-3fce-923a-e4863137dec3Timeline Phase Duration: 19.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 225532fd-6658-3fce-923a-e4863137dec3Group Index: 0
                                                                      • +
                                                                        296.Astarion: You can choose differently, of course, but the consequences are on your head.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 772f9ba3-00b3-e24e-72fc-629b2c536c7fSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9a6ccc40g1449g49a0gb1d6gc9e88c012be9Text UUID: 48f229fd-6e41-46da-9041-790f65a3df9bGroup ID: 225532fd-6658-3fce-923a-e4863137dec3Group Index: 1
                                                                        • +

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          • +

                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      255.Astarion: We're not like those wretches, brother. We've spent lifetimes controlling our hunger - they're all but feral.

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 651cd7a0-8e64-db03-a947-8402931cf1ddSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1d2df283g1e3bg4110gaab3g4a71eb09d22fText UUID: 791d5758-eed6-4da4-bf04-55d3e6358449Group ID: f7185694-a33f-2db3-5c71-e8f3c3de9e7eGroup Index: 1
                                                                                      • +

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                          357.Astarion: I am done picking up after Cazador. I wash my hands of all of this. This place, this ritual, these people.

                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8d8013c9-f9fe-b95d-d382-96ec9b29953fSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h28c0142cg84bcg4c32g9500gc6c9be53b71fText UUID: 73f0bd6c-194e-46b0-b057-888d0133be76Timeline Phase Index: 11Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8d8013c9-f9fe-b95d-d382-96ec9b29953fTimeline Phase Duration: 9.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: break_staff_01 (85cbb953-8e5b-42cc-8724-b8a66ea3a672) @ 91.48s
                                                                                          • +

                                                                      355.Astarion: Your choices are simple, really.

                                                                      • See Node 95 (Astarion) You can hide here, living in the shadows like parasites, or you can be more than what he made us to be.

                                            406.Narrator: *You can see the fear in his eyes, but also the hunger. The thick smell of blood in the air and the promise of power being so close is intoxicating to him.*LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_PostCombat_State_PassedInsight

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0844a45-f291-7907-0633-e0339c95daf8Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h39a23b77g6972g49b8ga318g5ad81640bbd3Text UUID: c52a52e3-e906-4a28-963c-be731dc279edTimeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a0844a45-f291-7907-0633-e0339c95daf8Timeline Phase Duration: 25.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 229.55sGroup ID: a0844a45-f291-7907-0633-e0339c95daf8Group Index: 0
                                            • •
                                              413.Narrator: *All he can see is the power of the ritual, and the freedom that power brings. The freedom to do anything - to be anything.*

                                              Metadata

                                                        55.Astarion: Use the parasite - link your mind to mine. Through your eyes, I can see the scars on my back and copy them onto his.

                                                        Metadata

                                                          • +

                                                                        99.Narrator: *Your minds join and your two selves become one.                     69.Speaker 0: And then? What will you be without me? A shade? A spectre in the shadows, devoid of all purpose?

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1c511f5c-a8cf-7f01-35ca-e6a75be5c48aSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hd6b82fdbg9ed0g408egae43g995731b694dfText UUID: 20e363a6-14b9-4c32-9dca-90a25a0cf5e1Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1c511f5c-a8cf-7f01-35ca-e6a75be5c48aTimeline Phase Duration: 13.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 1258.58sAddressed Speaker: 1
                    • +
                      298.Player: He'll be free. Nothing else matters.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 77621a21-d057-3bbe-7f85-feb43c109f48Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h84a5735agfc9cg47c2g9e78gaed4624e67f3Text UUID: f8233d5b-c40b-41f3-86bc-64821e746f85Show Once: True
                      • +
                        485.Speaker 0: The spawn will never be free. He is my creation, now and for eternity.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bfe6e0e0-8586-3e59-9465-b5d9187719a7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3d019f39gc68dg4372g8410g9257341004a0Text UUID: 86b7fff1-1180-4195-a749-8ac007aa087bTimeline Phase Index: 197Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bfe6e0e0-8586-3e59-9465-b5d9187719a7Timeline Phase Duration: 16.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 2274.16sGroup ID: bfe6e0e0-8586-3e59-9465-b5d9187719a7Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 2
                        • +
                          108.Astarion: You might have made me what I am, but I can be so much more than what you created me to be.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2b0d195f-98cf-2832-aed2-f25e653cdfcdSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0f5b37f6gcdd3g4578g9bd6g1750defb5566Text UUID: 852611ca-a4c1-41e5-92a9-f6abfa897250Group ID: bfe6e0e0-8586-3e59-9465-b5d9187719a7Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 0
                          • +
                            148.Astarion: But I am grateful for one thing. You showed me how to really savour moments like this.note: Hunkers down face-to-face with Cazador

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3951c73d-ebac-59e0-0094-ad9bf8cde8feSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2d09d385g3d13g4095g9d68g5ec646fa061fText UUID: 0cc1fed1-c389-4e51-9f73-6bd657918c1cTimeline Phase Index: 245Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3951c73d-ebac-59e0-0094-ad9bf8cde8feTimeline Phase Duration: 13.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Addressed Speaker: 0
                            • •

                    • +
                      321.Player: He'll be a hero.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7edf522e-0958-4244-14c0-c64965415d2bSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hf96f24b0g4472g496dg8497gbf67f2404b4eText UUID: 74fc6225-c65d-4881-b00f-7d6aac2feab8Show Once: True
                      • +
                        607.Speaker 0: Hero? You think they will sing songs of the blood-drinking saviour? The one who lurks in the shadows?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef64a197-508d-847c-2cf1-938e0f6a8522Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hf992d6dcgad6dg41a4g9042gd5a892ba2d29Text UUID: 3bf7a955-e096-4609-982d-6c7ba82cc85fTimeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef64a197-508d-847c-2cf1-938e0f6a8522Timeline Phase Duration: 17.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 1069.68sGroup ID: ef64a197-508d-847c-2cf1-938e0f6a8522Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 2
                        • +
                          520.Astarion: Maybe they will. Maybe they won't. Maybe it doesn't matter.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce659162-dbfc-d320-1efb-73ed876f3c6eSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf85a8242gd311g4bb8gb81dgfcaae80a705cText UUID: ff4f251f-28fe-40d7-b6af-bb846439917cGroup ID: ef64a197-508d-847c-2cf1-938e0f6a8522Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 0
                          • See Node 148 (Astarion) But I am grateful for one thing. You showed me how to really savour moments like this.
                    • +
                      504.Player: He'll be mine. And I'll be his.ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Object | speaker 2 Player
                      • ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion {30819c8d-b39d-42e7-acd1-2a8c2c309994} = True

                      • +
                        609.Speaker 0: Cling to that if you must, but know it is a lie. He's mine.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef7e18df-5da3-924b-5e50-174d8852dda4Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hdaa1287cg1118g4e9ag8d92g28cb27ad7095Text UUID: 3c6248a7-7606-4503-a6f5-70229b6b2f6aTimeline Phase Index: 132Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef7e18df-5da3-924b-5e50-174d8852dda4Timeline Phase Duration: 12.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 1215.93sGroup ID: ef7e18df-5da3-924b-5e50-174d8852dda4Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 2
                        • +
                          493.Astarion: He's not wrong. There's always going to be a part of him in me.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2998f83-2d23-5981-cdc4-a0764134fdedSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: heab1858agd7d6g40ecg90bageceadedbc24dText UUID: 0a3d203a-7cd7-4df9-bfd6-4e1cdafd4342Group ID: ef7e18df-5da3-924b-5e50-174d8852dda4Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 2
                          • See Node 148 (Astarion) But I am grateful for one thing. You showed me how to really savour moments like this.
                    • +

                          115.Astarion: But if I finish the ritual you started, I'll never have to fear anyone, ever.!LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted

                          Flags and Tags

                          checktype Global
                          • LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted {71cb0aae-aea2-4304-9932-4c57bf6669a8} = False

                          • +
                            359.Speaker 0: You think me a fool? That I would allow anyone to usurp me, speak the words, and ascend in my place?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8eb7f267-a5d3-e8e1-4a07-66886b97e525Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hdd0e28f5g7f15g403ag8595ga4d54b807bd9Text UUID: 82884b4a-71f0-4602-99b2-60f695f58891Group ID: 2ca390a6-1415-dc25-e6ab-5d214d7087e7Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 1
                            • +
                              89.Speaker 0: The runes I carved into your flesh bind you and all seven thousand souls to the ritual. Complete it and those bearing the scars will be sacrificed - you included.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20ee2ca9-9e8c-4d77-9e4e-a1321740b1c3Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h22125747g251ag42bdga110gc7bb2b7282b2Text UUID: 6f50280d-c902-4cd1-b4e1-8b07891a4e68Group ID: 2ca390a6-1415-dc25-e6ab-5d214d7087e7Group Index: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                              • +
                                616.Speaker 0: You are simply a means to an end. I made you to be consumed.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2597356-83d8-a0b3-3c28-35514acadf6aSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hbd8f745cgd13fg4019g8b53g2c9c95273ca6Text UUID: 01814ed5-807b-46b5-bcba-80771afad7c5Group ID: 2ca390a6-1415-dc25-e6ab-5d214d7087e7Group Index: 3Addressed Speaker: 1
                                • +
                                  310.Astarion: I am so much more than what you made me.

                                  Metadata

                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      134.Astarion: I... I can't feel it. That ache in my stomach, that hunger - it's gone.

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 32af0069-03aa-d858-1ff6-88400431d2c4Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0d2ffbb7gb056g4920g8248g76f4680b011fText UUID: 7e46fe58-7fcb-44bf-9c51-a34ddcfc139dGroup ID: e0e680f7-7f02-d866-c205-51d67297d8e5Group Index: 1
                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        210.Astarion: I'm free. I'm finally free! Oh it feels delicious.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 544c741a-4b91-8c36-e5c9-4a450f2c10f2Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc2381e03g3729g4144g9766gecf488d08b62Text UUID: 9c0d799d-6749-4b0a-a89b-67bea8f8634dGroup ID: e0e680f7-7f02-d866-c205-51d67297d8e5Group Index: 2
                                                                                        • •

                                                • +

                                                  • +
                                                    194.Speaker 0: No - urgh!note: Astarion, hunkered down before him, stabs Cazador in the chest. Cazador slumps to the ground, lying on his back. Astarion rams the knife into Cazador's chest over and over, letting out centuries of rage.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f1e6913-82f8-0367-96b8-f7c78697546eSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hb9ad4587gcbc2g4d60g9fa1gb83ae946bd0dText UUID: 0e1fc800-15b9-43d2-adc8-12da899741bcGroup ID: 56bba366-3949-7892-332b-6235827ef638Group Index: 1
                                                    • +

                                              80.Speaker 11: We have no love for beasts. But to slaughter so many like chickens in coops, without even a fair hunt... it does not sit well with Boo.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomMinsc

                          141.Speaker 0: And then? What will you be without me? A shade? A spectre in the shadows, devoid of all purpose?

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hd1ff388eg11ebg455ag832bg5e8a8ec4cc3dText UUID: d927e49a-1d4d-49e3-8096-e122bf7723fdTimeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Timeline Phase Duration: 94.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 18Timeline Location Changes: OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (03e4a771-8ef3-4d3c-a510-43a1de502bbd) @ 1952.65s; AstarionStabsCazador_00 (28e714e3-b5fe-4648-b297-39412f917126) @ 1985.44s; AstarionStabsCazador_00 (28e714e3-b5fe-4648-b297-39412f917126) @ 2009.96s; OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_qCam (891c4626-7417-4221-9c49-abc234b1a36b) @ 2047.17sGroup ID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 1
                          • +
                            533.Astarion: You might have made me what I am, but I can be so much more than what you created me to be.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d74696bd-6f07-1bf6-64f3-b21c84ad5409Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7e568cccg2054g4d50g81e6g0fb75c7dd6feText UUID: 0831e931-4823-4204-96ed-da2b38a09e4bGroup ID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 0
                            • +
                              169.Astarion: But I am grateful for one thing. You showed me how to really savour moments like this.note: Hunkers down face-to-face with Cazador

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44cee466-adfc-853b-c0de-29c019a16fddSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h55f8ba85gcf12g4311g8b7bgd4ad3d96ed02Text UUID: eac80381-d528-402e-a604-35811b9b2b48Group ID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Group Index: 2Addressed Speaker: 0
                              • +
                                408.Speaker 0: No - urgh!note: Astarion, hunkered down before him, stabs Cazador in the chest. Cazador slumps to the ground, lying on his back. Astarion rams the knife into Cazador's chest over and over, letting out centuries of rage.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a269a95a-1c75-6bab-7066-e99531733a2bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: he62628eeg0ebcg4d3eg83cag0ef027a727aeText UUID: 24dad133-4480-4cd8-a70c-439e7bb5bfa6Group ID: 342ed001-89da-8c2f-7e7b-6feecc081b99Group Index: 3
                                • +
                                  31.Astarion: [Panting]note: Astarion is kneeling by the body, covered in gore, panting. The knife falls from his hand.ORI_Astarion_State_StayedVampireSpawn

                                                642.Speaker 14: What does that mean for us?

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc220504-e8bb-640e-f0e9-c69331cdd5a4Speaker: 14 (Speaker 14)Text Handle: hfdc2bce0g11a7g43a1g8ca7g114ed816b726Text UUID: 2fceb444-f8bf-44e2-b15f-4655c0473715Timeline Phase Index: 203Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc220504-e8bb-640e-f0e9-c69331cdd5a4Timeline Phase Duration: 33.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Timeline Location Changes: AstarionStabsCazador_aftermath (2728b31e-9c19-48f0-9476-01d8c1b5cc0a) @ 2389.48s; AstarionStabsCazador_aftermath_dialogue_01 (b4bf121c-e10b-486e-8221-07ff9d0608e9) @ 2392.17sGroup ID: fc220504-e8bb-640e-f0e9-c69331cdd5a4Group Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  512.Astarion: It means you have a choice.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb1a37a6-389b-4460-0660-7d0a8692d63cSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd0eaf277g21e5g46a9gb012g41763c4b29f2Text UUID: 41fd4a8e-0e13-4f8d-a9a8-b1c3bb43b52bGroup ID: fc220504-e8bb-640e-f0e9-c69331cdd5a4Group Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    227.Astarion: You can hide here, living in the shadows like parasites, or you can be more than what he made us to be.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a163353-c485-55ef-afb2-f5d08d883034Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h95e108feg9706g4fe0gb9c6g26317c1c1b7eText UUID: 52cde0c1-d4bd-4958-a055-cb68522658beGroup ID: fc220504-e8bb-640e-f0e9-c69331cdd5a4Group Index: 2
                                                    • +
                                                      545.Speaker 13: And what does it mean for them?note: Gesturing to the prisoners in the cages all around them (this is in a vast cavern full of cells and cages

                                                      Metadata

                                                      • +

                        • See Node 141 (Speaker 0) And then? What will you be without me? A shade? A spectre in the shadows, devoid of all purpose?

                                      411.Speaker 0: I - no. No, you misunderstand, boy. I did that for you. Because I could not see you suffer.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a3b4c592-7f25-e6e6-0a09-715cb96ed4b5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h77fc4549g3269g4b69ga981gc07b139c1b38Text UUID: e5383e11-f4b5-4645-9c59-6d456c9da999Timeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a3b4c592-7f25-e6e6-0a09-715cb96ed4b5Timeline Phase Duration: 11.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • See Node 315 (Speaker 0) My child, please... have mercy.

                                    8.Failure
                                    • +
                                      429.Speaker 0: More words, more prattle. You always adored the sound of your own voice. It's why the others hated you so.

                          606.Astarion: Then tell me how to complete the ritual.!LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted

                          Flags and Tags

                          checktype Global
                          • LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_RitualCannotBeCompleted {71cb0aae-aea2-4304-9932-4c57bf6669a8} = False

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ee771e38-3473-8d96-76c8-324202f5fe7dSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h08055b44g23a5g4a33g9802ga301342c2227Text UUID: c35f8b8c-5291-4eab-948c-18a4cd536f90Show Once: True
                          • +
                            490.Speaker 0: You think me a fool? That I would allow anyone to usurp me, speak the words, and ascend in my place?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1b9c8cb-cb95-7849-9759-f46880af8164Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5f23f5b0g1e55g40c7gbdeeg17fa3b995543Text UUID: 00b9f051-aef2-479a-b05f-05508d851fcbTimeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c1b9c8cb-cb95-7849-9759-f46880af8164Timeline Phase Duration: 38.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 7Group ID: c1b9c8cb-cb95-7849-9759-f46880af8164Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 1
                            • +
                              292.Speaker 0: The runes I carved into your flesh bind you and all seven thousand souls to the ritual. Complete it and those bearing the scars will be sacrificed - you included.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7315e6c8-cef1-3582-2e00-a34d9f7110dbSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5b4ac8f4g33dfg452bg812bg743c928829d0Text UUID: 3fb12350-c1b4-403a-8888-d5b668c4587eGroup ID: c1b9c8cb-cb95-7849-9759-f46880af8164Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 1
                              • +
                                360.Narrator: *You can see from the glee in his face that he's telling the truth and he thinks you have no way forward. But then again, he didn't say whom the scars had to be carved into...*

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8f00250d-832e-5c4d-cd6c-f3b01d69f535Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h4221c14dg0929g464fgbf68g6c50eaab2c9fText UUID: 6096ed38-e551-4d16-807c-1aabfeb712b4Group ID: c1b9c8cb-cb95-7849-9759-f46880af8164Group Index: 2
                                • +
                                  151.Astarion: Then you can bear my runes and be sacrificed in my place.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 39e6d0c5-e87a-4067-9977-47f42b5d1310Speaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: h40a2d6f7gd241g41cdgab8dg4c9dbc1dfdccText UUID: d9721235-6ae6-463d-8f74-8494f1406ffbShow Once: True
                                  • +
                                    594.Speaker 0: No. You do not have the skill.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9b8bd58-4449-2d33-84e8-d0205af852ebSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hca5e5c31ge975g4a32g968eg13ea583333caText UUID: 15e441a5-68b9-4953-987f-e269830da849Timeline Phase Index: 172Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e9b8bd58-4449-2d33-84e8-d0205af852ebTimeline Phase Duration: 15.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Location Changes: AOM_OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (455d28d1-f41d-4ffd-bc67-301ae2b1b2c2) @ 1808.47sGroup ID: e9b8bd58-4449-2d33-84e8-d0205af852ebGroup Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      13.Speaker 0: Your knife will slip. You will misremember a rune. A single mistake and you will be consumed.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 038f891f-38de-df8b-2980-2def5acc8709Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h611f423eg327fg40dcgaf37g9667bffc2fb3Text UUID: e77767c2-1ade-466a-831f-aaf21c355e88Group ID: e9b8bd58-4449-2d33-84e8-d0205af852ebGroup Index: 1

                                              195.Astarion: Enter your companion's mind and see the scars through their eyes.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4f256cc3-b98b-95e8-8615-c6f7b7fe778eSpeaker: 1 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf670da12gbc49g4c0bg962fg5a1317af5218Text UUID: fe830be1-a27d-4a41-9569-576f7441e09eShow Once: True
                                              • +
                                                529.Narrator: *Your minds join and your two selves become one. You can feel the knife in your hand, but also see the scars on your back.*

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d501c43e-b51d-85ad-ab12-cd6b55cb09e4Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hfa3db5f2gfab0g4c7bg9f41gd2da74a6d373Text UUID: 016cee43-496c-4240-9ea5-8e3a37f2e999Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d501c43e-b51d-85ad-ab12-cd6b55cb09e4Timeline Phase Duration: 10.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Location Changes: AOM_AstarionCarvesCazador_00 (4ad85f2f-67e6-40c1-901c-f340d526a69d) @ 1100.88s
                                                • +
                                                  120.Narrator: *If you complete this ritual, there will be no atonement. Seven thousand of your own kind, dead by your hand. All but Cazador yourself.*

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2da64736-39d4-9379-bf37-9224acecb370Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hd3bda844gad92g4b76gb236g8869a89fc571Text UUID: 632dd4e5-001b-4906-b93e-aad16925043cTimeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2da64736-39d4-9379-bf37-9224acecb370Timeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: AOM_OutOfCoffin_Dialogue_01 (455d28d1-f41d-4ffd-bc67-301ae2b1b2c2) @ 2313.66sOptional: TrueUnmapped Attributes: stub

                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                      102.Origin_Intro_Wyll: They're victims, Astarion - just like you. They deserve freedom, too.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomWyll

                                                                                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                      79.Gale: For the best. They may not be the safest types to unleash, but their deaths would have weighed heavy on you.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomGale

                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                      90.Speaker 13: Although, what of them? What are you going to do with the ones we brought here?

                                                                                                      • See Node 590 (Narrator) *Cazador's staff controlled everything during the ritual. If it controls the cells too, you could decide their fate.*
                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                  507.Failure
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    596.Speaker 14: A beast is a beast, and I am not going to be freed of his chains just to put on yours.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    • +

                                                                                                    521.Speaker 14: Cazador was alone - we are not. And we will not let you stand in the way of our freedom.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d0681738-4fb8-3e95-599c-fb0ea5d4a0bbSpeaker: 14 (Speaker 14)Text Handle: h46724e31g621eg48e3g9241gd232d4b2bb8cText UUID: e85b7ed6-4c72-4795-a576-1ee6b5d863d1Timeline Phase Index: 122Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d0681738-4fb8-3e95-599c-fb0ea5d4a0bbTimeline Phase Duration: 6.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Location Changes: AOM_AstarionStabsCazador_aftermathB (0b8e700d-f7b9-424a-98d9-72ad389853e0) @ 1087.64s
                                                                                                    • See Node 118 (Speaker 13) Wait, what of the others? What are you going to do with the ones we brought here?
                                                                                              • +

                            537.Speaker 0: No - urgh!note: Astarion, hunkered down before him, stabs Cazador in the chest. Cazador slumps to the ground, lying on his back. Astarion rams the knife into Cazador's chest over and over, letting out centuries of rage.

    514.Narrator: *Your companion smiles, but it doesn't reach their eyes. Without a word they turn away.* [End]
